odejs\;C:\Users\ZakariaOsman\openjfx-25.0.1_windows-x64_bin-sdk\javafx-sdk-25.0.1\lib;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0 in;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0 in\;C:\Users\ZakariaOsman\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\ZakariaOsman\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\ZakariaOsman\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop in;C:\apache-maven-3.9.11 in;C:\Users\ZakariaOsman\AppData\Roaming

testcase.system-err: Feb 22, 2026 10:30:44 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 145 Feb 22, 2026 10:30:44 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 145.0.7632.77. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.15.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.15.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.system-err: Feb 22, 2026 10:30:54 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 145 Feb 22, 2026 10:30:54 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 145.0.7632.77. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.15.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
